violations.text: Refrigerator door gaskets on the kitchen low boy by the cooking line were observed in poor repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. The door located on the deli low boy was not in good repair. Equipment must be mainatined in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/04/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the dishwashing room have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Dishwashing room must be maintained clean. New Violation. Correct By: 11/11/2025

The condensate from the Walk in Freezer refrigeration units and the Chicken walk in fridge were observed with an excess of ice build up. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. Establishment must defrost units. New Violation. Correct By: 11/11/2025
The floor in the meat walk in cooler was observed in poor repair crack in floor. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/04/2026

The drain between the seafood department and seafood walk in is in poor condition. The floor in the kitchen freezer is in poor repair. The floor by the meat case is in poor condition. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/11/2025

The three door low boy in the cold food prep area was observed held at 49 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Food items were voluntarily disposed of. Service call was placed at time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 09/11/2024

The drain between the seafood department and seafood walk in is in poor condition. The floor in the kitchen freezer is in poor repair. The floor by the meat case is in poor condition. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/11/2025

Chicken, pasta salad, cooked glaze carrots, were observed held at deli-display unit between 43-45 degrees Fahrenheit. Per person in charge all food were stocked in case before inspection. Food items were moved to blast chiller for cold down temperature. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/08/2023

The door to the outside, located in the side back door, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 06/22/2023
Sanitizer dispenser position above the food prep sink at the produce area must be removed. Corrected on Jun 10/2023. see attachment. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/22/2023
Low boy refrigerator door gasket at the deli-department was observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/10/2023

The non-food contact surfaces of the fans at the walk-in refrigerator's units (produce, kitchen and meat department) and gaskets at the kitchen and deli department have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Corrected by June 10,2023 see attachment. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/08/2023

The walls in the Deli/preparation area are observed scratch and paint is peeling apart. This material is not durable. Materials for wall surfaces shall be smooth, durable, easily cleanable, and non-absorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. New Violation. Correct By: 06/22/2023

The tile grout in the main kitchen and bakery area are in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Facility is in the process of re-grouting the floors, all areas where the grout has been worn away must be re-grouted. Corrected by 9/22/2023. See attachment. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/08/2023
